name: Shojja Hospital
description: A multi-tenant mobile client designed for a comprehensive hospital ecosystem, facilitating secure patient login, localized resource management, and notification dispatch.
contributions: Built the core authentication module (OTP verification via REST APIs)
Configured localized string resources for multi-language accessibility
Integrated FCM for real-time notification dispatch and offline data caching using Dio interceptors

name: My Robi
description: A leading self-care telecommunications application in Bangladesh with millions of active users. It allows customers to manage accounts, recharge balances, buy mobile internet packs, and activate customized telecom bundles.
contributions: Refactored legacy UI components to match modern layout design guidelines
Optimized API integrations and resolved visual lag and critical app crashes
Improved overall application stability and enhanced the self-care user experience

name: My Airtel BD
description: A user-friendly self-care mobile application for Airtel BD subscribers that enables real-time account balance tracking, bundle purchases, and telecom subscription management.
contributions: Integrated REST endpoints for real-time account management data
Resolved UI rendering and navigation bugs across multiple Android device sizes

name: Weighing Scale App
description: An industrial utility application that establishes connections with external weighing scale hardware to facilitate real-time weight tracking.
contributions: Managed the Bluetooth communication lifecycle and handled input streams
Implemented asynchronous listeners to process hardware byte streams
Built a background connection service with auto-reconnection logic to handle physical hardware disconnections

name: CZM Mobile App
description: Transparent Zakat fund mobilization and distribution Flutter platform for beneficiaries and donors, featuring Zakat fund calculators, matchmaking lists, and user profile management.
contributions: Integrated REST APIs using code generation (Retrofit/Dio)
Refactored Provider state trees to ensure layout responsiveness and efficient data loading
Optimized profile lists via lazy rendering to prevent screen transition lag

name: Biyeta
description: Most trusted matchmaking and matrimony mobile application in Bangladesh featuring profile setups and matchmaking workflows.
contributions: Developed dynamic profile setup modules and updated navigation structures
Resolved nested profile list rendering and image loading constraints
Restructured network clients to optimize load latency and performance
